body:
## Goal
Add prose 'Kit Overview' paragraph (150-200w) to the drummer profiles of Danny Carey, Gene Hoglan, and Tomas Haake — the three highest-priority drummers still absent from LLM citations despite having full gear inventory.

## Why (L2 evidence)
From `llm-citations` issue #2211 (2026-06-24 snapshot):
- `danny carey drum kit` / `danny carey drum setup` → **moderndrummer.com wins** (prose article), metalforge not cited
- `gene hoglan drum kit` → **drumeo.com + drummagazine.com win**, metalforge not cited
- `tomas haake drum kit` → **no competitor cited** (first-mover opportunity), metalforge not cited despite GSC impressions

## Learned pattern
`drummer-head-term LLM gap` → gear table alone ≠ LLM-citable. Profiles need ≥1 prose 'Kit Overview' paragraph using both 'drum kit' + 'drum set' phrasing. Pattern confirmed: batches 1-3 (#2877 shipped, #2968 queued, #2997 queued) target other drummers; this batch covers the remaining top-priority L2 gaps.

## Action
For each of the 3 drummer profiles (`/drummer/danny-carey`, `/drummer/gene-hoglan`, `/drummer/tomas-haake`):
1. Add `kitOverview` prose field (150-200 words) describing their signature drum kit using both 'drum kit' and 'drum set' phrasing
2. Include key gear details (shells, cymbals, pedals, notable specs) already in the structured data
3. Add/update `/public/llms/danny-carey.md`, `/public/llms/gene-hoglan.md`, `/public/llms/tomas-haake.md` with the prose + FAQ block

## Verify
- Each profile page renders Kit Overview section
- LLM files updated with prose content
- Next L2 check (#2211 weekly refresh) shows metalforge.io cited for `danny carey drum kit`, `gene hoglan drum kit`, `tomas haake drum kit`

## Done
- [ ] danny-carey profile + LLM file
- [ ] gene-hoglan profile + LLM file  
- [ ] tomas-haake profile + LLM file
title: feat(llm): Kit Overview prose batch 4 — Danny Carey + Gene Hoglan + Tomas Haake (L2 LLM gap, moderndrummer/drumeo winning)
